title: alyssum maritimum var. intermedium
intro: Alyssum maritimum var. intermedium, also known as Sea Blush or Beach Alyssum, is a type of flowering plant in the mustard family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including its ability to soothe respiratory issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. The herbal preparations of Alyssum maritimum var. intermedium include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
